failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, below required 41.5 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Adjust BPR to at least 41.5 bar to prevent overpressure

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Implement inline filtration and regular cleaning protocols

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=3.81543 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR adjustment to 41.5 bar and monitor system stability for 30 min
Conduct flow test with inline filtration to assess blockage risk over 120 min
